stdout: usage: pcl [-h] [--root ROOT] [--json] [--version] {init,start,doctor,validate,migrate,audit,render,update,goal,feature,story,test,task,defect,loop,workflow,jobs,prompt,agent,ingest-agent-run,evidence,contract,context,receipt,index,code,impact,eval,verification,decision,escalation,checkpoint,next,finish,resume,export,report} ... Project Loop Harness CLI positional arguments: {init,start,doctor,validate,migrate,audit,render,update,goal,feature,story,test,task,defect,loop,workflow,jobs,prompt,agent,ingest-agent-run,evidence,contract,context,receipt,index,code,impact,eval,verification,decision,escalation,checkpoint,next,finish,resume,export,report} init Initialize Project Loop Harness in a target project start Start one intent as minimal active project work doctor Check project-loop installation health validate Validate project-loop state migrate Apply or inspect database migrations audit Manage the SQLite-backed audit projection render Render dashboard from state update Check for newer pcl releases goal Manage goals feature Manage features story Manage user stories test Manage test cases task Manage tasks defect Manage defects loop Inspect or run loops workflow Manage workflow proposals jobs Inspect agent jobs prompt Print generated prompts agent Manage agents and generate adapter commands ingest-agent-run Record an agent output file as evidence evidence Record or inspect standalone evidence artifacts contract Validate versioned artifact contracts context Build focused machine context packages receipt Inspect code context receipts index Build and inspect the code context index code Search indexed code context impact Explain likely code impact from a diff eval Evaluate retrieval fixtures verification Record verification results decision Manage human decisions escalation Manage human escalations checkpoint Record and inspect integration checkpoints next Suggest the next harness action finish Plan terminal loop close-out steps resume Build a read-only handoff packet for current work export Export state report Generate evidence reports options: -h, --help show this help message and exit --root ROOT Project root. Defaults to current directory. --json Emit machine-readable JSON output. --version show program's version number and exit
